title: Xquisite Algerian Linguine Salad
description: A vibrant linguine salad with a bright lemon-honey glaze and fresh Algerian herbs, perfect for a light lunch.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the linguine for 8 minutes until al dente, then drain and rinse with cold water to stop the cooking process.
In a small bowl whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, honey, salt and pepper until the honey dissolves and the mixture forms a smooth glaze.
Toss the cooled linguine in the glaze, ensuring each strand is coated evenly.
Add the halved cherry tomatoes, diced cucumber, sliced olives, and chopped mint to the pasta and gently stir to combine.
Taste and adjust seasoning with additional salt or pepper if desired.
Transfer the salad to a serving bowl and let it sit at room temperature for 10 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Just before serving, drizzle a little extra olive oil over the top for shine.
Present the salad on a platter and garnish with a few extra mint leaves for a fresh appearance.
